blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
